channel.title: Projects on highpingblorg
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on highpingblorg

item.title: This Website
item.description: In today’s digital age, a personal portfolio website is essential for showcasing your skills, projects, and experiences. Whether you’re a developer, designer, writer, or any other professional, having an online presence can significantly boost your visibility and credibility. This article will explain how I created this website. Why Hugo? Hugo is one of the most popular open-source static site generators. It’s known for its speed, flexibility, and ease of use. Here are a few reasons why Hugo is an excellent choice for your portfolio:

item.title: Linux and Open-source Threat Intelligence
item.description: The increasing reliance on Linux and open-source software in the IT industry brings numerous benefits, such as cost savings, flexibility, and community support. However, this dependence also introduces unique security challenges. My bachelor dissertation, “Linux and Open-Source Threat Intelligence,” dives deep into these challenges, offering a comprehensive examination of how organizations can leverage Cyber Threat Intelligence (CTI) to enhance their security posture in a Linux and open-source environment. The Research Focus My research addresses a crucial question: How can organizations running entirely on Linux and open-source software effectively leverage cyber threat intelligence?

item.title: Security Audit
item.description: In today’s rapidly evolving cyber landscape, securing an organization’s assets goes beyond just implementing the latest technology. It requires a deep understanding of both technical and social aspects of security. Recently, I had the opportunity to perform comprehensive security audits for two separate organizations, aiming to assess and enhance their overall security posture. Here’s a detailed look into the process and the valuable insights gained from these audits. Initial Assessment and Planning Every successful security audit begins with thorough preparation.
